vo_text: Born on July 13? Your card is the 2 of Diamonds. In Cardology it's called The Financial Partner. Treat it as a mirror, not a forecast. You're the resource negotiator. Your mind works in reciprocity. You're creating fair exchanges and mutual benefit through balanced partnership. Your gifts: natural understanding of fair exchange, ability to create balanced partnerships around resources, and diplomatic skill in financial negotiations. You understand value exchange and partnership in material terms. You're good at splitting bills, sharing assets, creating fair deals. The shadow side? You lose yourself in material partnerships. You give too much to maintain the relationship. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.
title: Born July 13? Your Birth Card Is the 2 of Diamonds #shorts
